scope: monitor-backed DMA/IOMMU/MemoryView invalidation source map for CapSched QueueLease revoke

authority_root.required: monitor-owned DmaReachabilityTag, QueueTag, QueueLeaseEpoch, PageOwner, and MemoryView receipt
not_authority: Linux page refcount or unpin alone

required_receipt_events: monitor-owned RID/PASID/domain attachment or equivalent DMA root
new submit/descriptor/XSK buffer/access pin/MemoryView borrow embargo
IRQ route invalidated as a separate prerequisite
hardware-observed queue quiescence or stronger reset/fence
iommufd/VFIO access users released or quarantined
IOTLB or equivalent stale-translation invalidation completed
device DMA domain/PASID fenced for old epoch
outstanding DMA drained or affected pages quarantined

source_anchors.limitation: Driver cleanup and XSK DMA unmap do not prove monitor-owned IOMMU/IOTLB/MemoryView/PageOwner invalidation. The ice_qp_dis per-queue Rx disable uses wait=false before ring cleanup, so queue cleanup is not hardware quiescence proof.

iommu_unmap_fast and queued flush paths split translation removal from completed stale-translation invalidation. Returning a group to core domain is blocking only while an owner exists; otherwise default DMA domain may be restored.
iommufd unmap/detach is Linux cooperation substrate; the monitor must still verify DMA reachability and PageOwner/MemoryView state.
VFIO unmap/unpin is not a monitor-owned PageOwner transfer or stale-DMA drain proof.
Backend invalidation must be lifted into an explicit monitor-visible receipt for the target hardware.

required_invariants: No QueueLease reassignment without DMA invalidation receipt
No DMA invalidation receipt without monitor-owned DMA root
No DMA invalidation receipt without new-work embargo
No DMA invalidation receipt without hardware-observed queue quiescence
No DMA invalidation receipt without HW-owned descriptor drain
No DMA invalidation receipt while iommufd/VFIO access users can still hold pins
No DMA invalidation receipt without old device domain/PASID fence
No DMA invalidation receipt without IOMMU translation removal
No DMA invalidation receipt without completed IOTLB or equivalent stale-translation invalidation
No DMA invalidation receipt while queued flush is merely pending
No PageOwner transfer before outstanding DMA is drained
No new MemoryView mapping while old MemoryView or old DMA reachability remains
No normal completion delivery after revoke
No packet-page return before DMA invalidation receipt
forbidden_claims: IRQ route invalidation proves DMA revocation
ice ring cleanup proves DMA revocation
ice_qp_dis wait=false Rx disable proves hardware queue quiescence
dma_unmap_* return proves monitor-grade DMA revocation
queued IOVA flush request proves stale translation invalidation
iommufd IOAS unmap proves PageOwner transfer safety
VFIO dma_unmap callback proves PageOwner transfer safety
IOMMU group detach proves blocked DMA without checking owner/default-domain transition
packet page unpin/refcount release proves new Domain may map the page
